summary: Frontend translation testing completed for 5 specific issues from user report. All 5 translations verified working correctly in English mode.

issues: Call popup buttons 'رد' (Answer) and 'رفض' (Reject) still show in Arabic - minor issue, not part of current test scope

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 translation issues from user report have been verified as fixed. Testing was done in English mode by clicking 'English' button on login page.

issue_1_hr_discounts_title.description: HR Deductions section title should show 'Discounts - 2026-02' instead of Arabic
issue_1_hr_discounts_title.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Discounts - 2026-02' title with English column headers (Employee, Type, Amount, Reason, Date, Actions)

issue_2_hr_bonuses_title.description: HR Bonuses section title should show 'Bonuses - 2026-02' instead of Arabic
issue_2_hr_bonuses_title.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Bonuses - 2026-02' title with English column headers (Employee, Type, Amount, Reason, Date)

issue_3_hr_payroll_advance_deduction.description: HR Payroll column should show 'Advance Deduction' instead of 'استقطاع السلف'
issue_3_hr_payroll_advance_deduction.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Payroll Sheets - 2026-02' with 'Advance Deduction' column header in English

issue_4_kitchen_display_time_format.description: Kitchen Display time should show '1h 15m' format instead of '75س 1د' Arabic format
issue_4_kitchen_display_time_format.evidence: Screenshot shows order card with '75h 29m' time format in English (h for hours, m for minutes)

issue_5_settings_printers_badges.description: Settings Printers badges should show 'Cashier/Kitchen/Bar' instead of 'كاشير/مطبخ/بار'
issue_5_settings_printers_badges.evidence: Screenshot shows printer type badges in English: 'Cashier', 'Kitchen', 'Bar'

translations_verified.time_format: English format (h m) instead of Arabic (س د)
